title: Immersive blacksmithing
description: Adds more immersive into minecraft. Now you can feel like a blacksmith!
body:
# Immersive blacksmithing

You must install JEI mod with it.

This mod rebalances and reworks crafting in Minecraft. Now you should start your journey with copper tools, forging them on a granite anvil. To smelt copper from ore, you need to make a special disposable clay furnace. Since copper is a soft metal, it can be forged without heating. But to smelt iron, you must first make a blast furnace and a metal anvil.

To forge something, first put the items in the anvil according to the recipe, then hit it with a hammer as many as there are copper ingots in the anvil. If you forge from iron, then you need to hit it with a hammer twice as much.

While this is a beta test, something should definitely not work right.

Maked with Mcreator.
